tagline: Localize your repo on every commit.

hero.title: Hello in every language
hero.lede: This page is translated by Resource Translator itself, on every push to main, into every language Azure AI Translator supports.

phrases.open_pull_request: Open a pull request with fresh translations.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Ship your software anywhere on Earth.
phrases.thank_you: Thank you for trying Resource Translator.

features.reliable: Round-trips every byte of your source files.
features.configurable: Tone, industry, glossary, profanity — all configurable.
features.ci_native: Designed for GitHub Actions and pull-request workflows.

footer.powered_by: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.
